## Layoutable interface

Object that can be layout over a specific area.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface Layoutable<ParsedPosition> 
```

boolean


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Whether to skip rendering of the element. If `true`<!-- -->, the element has to be skipped and `layout()` should not be called. If `false` it will apply the regular rendering technique.  false
